narrative:
Miamisburg 4-A (precinct in Montgomery County) has 981 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.7 percentage points.
